dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your efforts to {quest_action} rattled {quest_threat}. They have turned desperate and struck at {quest_stakes} again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} confirmed that {enemy_type} are being used as enforcers near {quest_focus}. They have been gathering {location_hint}. We need to break through them and cut off the escape route.
dialogueChunks.outro: Justice demands we finish this. They cannot be allowed to keep hurting people.

playerResponses.text: They are cornered and lashing out. I will end this.
This is escalating fast. Double the pay.
Let them run. They are someone else's problem now.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is worse than we thought, {player_name}. Since you began to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat} did not act alone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There are accomplices hiding near {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} found evidence {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} they recruited are guarding the remaining {quest_item}. We need to deal with all of them.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every one of them played a part in harming {quest_stakes}. They all answer for it.

playerResponses.text: Accomplices make it more complicated, but not impossible.
A whole conspiracy now? Fine, let us clean house.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} left a warning. They know you are coming, and they have fortified their position near {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} intercepted signs that {enemy_type} are patrolling the approaches {location_hint}. They are daring us to come after them. {quest_stakes} will remain at risk until we confront them directly.
dialogueChunks.outro: They think they can intimidate us. Prove them wrong.

playerResponses.text: Intimidation only works on the timid. Let us go.
Fortified and expecting me? This will not be easy.
Walking into a trap is not my idea of justice.
